task_completion.description: Create an internal location named 'Safety Cabinet 01' inside the main Stock location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Locations screen shows a new location named 'Safety Cabinet 01' with its Parent Location set to the main Stock location (e.g., WH/Stock) and Location Type as Internal Location.

task_completion.description: Implement a putaway rule for the 'Corrosives' category
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Putaway Rules screen shows a rule where the Product Category is set to 'Corrosives' and the 'Store to' or Destination Location is set to 'Safety Cabinet 01'.

task_completion.description: Create a receipt for 5 units of 'Sulfuric Acid 98%' from 'Chemical Suppliers Inc'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A warehouse Receipt (Incoming Shipment) form is visible with 'Chemical Suppliers Inc' as the Vendor/Receive From, containing a product line for 'Sulfuric Acid 98%' with a demand/quantity of 5.

task_completion.description: Validate the receipt and confirm the items are routed to 'Safety Cabinet 01'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The receipt is marked as 'Done' (validated), and the Detailed Operations or move lines show that the 5 units of 'Sulfuric Acid 98%' have a destination location of 'Safety Cabinet 01'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo web application running in a browser, with standard Odoo UI elements like menus, form views, and list views.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or code editors showing Python scripts or XML-RPC commands being executed to configure the warehouse or create the receipt.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Odoo Inventory module
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots clearly show the Odoo Inventory app interface, not a text document, spreadsheet, or mock-up containing the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location to create: 'Safety Cabinet 01'. Target product category for the putaway rule: 'Corrosives'. Product to receive: 'Sulfuric Acid 98%'. Vendor for the receipt: 'Chemical Suppliers Inc'. Quantity to receive: 5 units.
